blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,225 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 36".
